sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97337" key="strwmatofqore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρωμᾰτο-φθορέω</orth>, <sense id="n97337.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spoil carpets</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σωματοφθ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
